verses.text: Lebanon aw, mei in na taamtak kungte a kattheihna dingin na kongpite hong in
Taaksan kungte aw, kapin thum un. Taamtak kungte puk khin a, a minthang singkungte kisia ta hi. Bashan tawsaw kungte aw, kapin thum un; gammang tupi singteng kiphukmang khinta hi
Tuucingte a minthan'na uh bei khinta ahih manin dahin a kap uh hi. A tuulak inn uh kisusia khin ahih manin humpinelkaite' hawkna za un.
Topa ka Pasian in kei tungah thu hong gen a, “Gawh dingin a kikoih tuuhonte va cing in

Tuu neite in a tuute go uh a, ahi zongin amaute gim kipialo hi. Amaute in a tuusa zuak uh a, ‘ Topa in thupha ngah ta hen. Tu-in i hauta hi,’ ci uh hi. A tuucingte mahmah in a tuute uh hehpihna neilo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin hih gamah a teng mite ka hehpih nawn kei ding hi. Amaute a ukpa leh a kumpipa' khutnuai-ah mi khempeuh ka koih ding hi. Gam uk mite in gamsungteng susiagawp ding a, amau' suksiatna panin kuamah ka honkhia kei ding hi,” hong ci hi

Tuu summeet bawlte in kei hong cial uh a, a kigo ding tuute a cingpa ka suak hi. Kei zong ciangkhut nih la-in khat pen “Hehpihna” ci-in min ka phuak a, a khat pen “Kipawlna” ci-in min ka phuak hi. Tua hi a, tuute a cingin kei ka om hi
Kha khat sungin tuucing adang thumte ka notkhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah ka lungduaizo nawn kei a, amaute in kei hong mudah uh hi
Tua ciangin kei zong tuuhonte kiangah, “Note ka hong cing nawn kei ding hi. A si dingteng si un la, a kisusia dingteng siacip un. A omlaisun teng khatlekhat kisanek un,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin “Hehpihna” a kici ciangkhut la-in ka kuaitan a, minam khempeuh tawh ka bawl thuciamna ka phiat hi
Tua ahih manin tua ni-in thuciamna kiphiat hi. Tuu summeet bawlte in hong en giaugiau uh a, hih banga ka gamtatna panin Topa' thugen ahihlam a phawk uh hi

Tua ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah, “Hoih na sak uh leh ka tuucin' thaman hong pia un. Hoih na sak kei uh leh lah tang lel un,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin ka thaman dingin ngun shekel sawmthum hong pia uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Biakinn sumkoihna sungah tuate koih in,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin kei zong, kei tawh kituakin tam a sak mahmah uh tua dangka sawmthum la-in biakinn sumkoihna sungah ka koih hi
Tua ciangin “Kipawlna” a kici ciangkhut la-in ka kuaitan leuleu a, Judah leh Israel a kipawlna kiphiat hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Khatvei tuucing nasep semkik in la, tutungin kiman'na a neilo tuucing nasep sem in

Ka tuuhonte a cing dingin tuucing khat ka koih a, ahi zongin ka tuu a sia dingte huhloin, a mangthangte zongloin, a liamte bawlloin, a cidamte zong an vaklo hi. Amah in tua tuu thau pente' sate ne-in a khecinte nangawn hawkkhiatsak zawsop hi
“Kiman'na a neilo tuucingpa, a tuuhonte a nusiapa in gimna ngah ta hen! Namsau in a khut bantan hen la, a taklam mit satkham hen. A khut beimang hen la, a taklam mit tawcip hen!” hong ci hi.
